LIVE ▸
"By His stripes you were healed."— 1 Peter 2:24·"God so loved the world He gave His only Son."— John 3:16·"I am the Lord who heals you."— Exodus 15:26·"My word is medicine to all your flesh."— Proverbs 4:22·Gospel Truth airs Mon–Fri at 7 AM & 10 PM EST on Daystar & TBN·"The same Spirit that raised Jesus dwells in you."— Romans 8:11·Healing Is Here Conference — August 12–15 · Register Now·"Bless the Lord who heals all your diseases."— Psalm 103:3·"By His stripes you were healed."— 1 Peter 2:24·"God so loved the world He gave His only Son."— John 3:16·"I am the Lord who heals you."— Exodus 15:26·"My word is medicine to all your flesh."— Proverbs 4:22·Gospel Truth airs Mon–Fri at 7 AM & 10 PM EST on Daystar & TBN·"The same Spirit that raised Jesus dwells in you."— Romans 8:11·Healing Is Here Conference — August 12–15 · Register Now·"Bless the Lord who heals all your diseases."— Psalm 103:3·
